product_overview: NuExis Digital Signage is a multi-tenant web application for managing digital signage displays across workspaces. Users can sign up, log in to a workspace, upload media, build playlists, and assign content to connected screens.
core_goals: Create a workspace and access it with the correct tenant-specific login
Upload and organize media assets for signage use
Build playlists from uploaded media and control their sequencing
Pair and manage screens connected to a workspace
View a player experience that renders signage content on connected displays

features.name: Global Landing Page
features.description: The public homepage introduces the platform and routes users to account creation or login.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Choose to log in -> See the login page
Navigate to / -> Choose to sign up -> See the registration page
Navigate to / -> Choose to create a workspace -> See the registration page

features.name: Global Authentication
features.description: A public login flow for entering email and password to access the platform.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit the login form -> See the next authenticated or validation outcome
Navigate to /login -> Enter invalid credentials -> Submit the login form -> See validation error messages

features.name: Registration and Workspace Setup
features.description: A public sign-up flow that creates a new account and initializes a workspace with a team slug.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Enter company name -> Enter workspace slug -> Submit the registration form -> See the workspace created outcome

features.name: Workspace Login
features.description: Tenant-specific sign-in that authenticates the user into a particular workspace context.
user_flows: Navigate to /customer/[team_slug]/login -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit the sign-in form -> See the workspace dashboard
Navigate to /customer/[team_slug]/login -> Enter invalid credentials -> Submit the sign-in form -> See validation error messages

features.name: Player Experience
features.description: A public player view that renders signage content for connected displays and listens for live updates.
user_flows: Navigate to /player -> View full-screen digital content -> Receive updated content through the live channel

features.name: Asset Management
features.description: A workspace-only library for uploading media and managing widgets used in signage content.
user_flows: Navigate to /customer/[team_slug]/asset -> Upload an image or video file -> See the asset appear in the library
Navigate to /customer/[team_slug]/asset -> Add a clock, RSS, or weather widget -> See the widget added to the workspace assets
Navigate to /customer/[team_slug]/asset -> Delete an existing asset -> See the asset removed from the library

features.name: Playlists Sequencing
features.description: A workspace-only tool for creating playlists from media assets and controlling their order and timing.
user_flows: Navigate to /customer/[team_slug]/playlists -> Create a new playlist -> Add media items to the timeline -> Reorder playlist items -> Save the playlist configuration
Navigate to /customer/[team_slug]/playlists -> Create a new playlist -> Add media items to the timeline -> Save the playlist configuration

features.name: Device Management and Pairing
features.description: A workspace-only screen management area for pairing devices, assigning playlists, and updating device details.
user_flows: Navigate to /customer/[team_slug]/screens -> View the screen list and status -> Pair a new screen by entering a numeric code -> See the screen added to the workspace
Navigate to /customer/[team_slug]/screens -> View the screen list and status -> Assign a playlist to a device -> See the device updated with the selected playlist
Navigate to /customer/[team_slug]/screens -> View the screen list and status -> Rename a device -> See the updated device name

routes.description: Landing page for NuExis Digital Signage Platform
Sign up new user and register a workspace
Digital signage player page for connected hardware displays
Main dashboard dashboard showing workspace widgets
Asset library management for media and widgets
Device fleet management and screen pairing

features.name: Global Landing Page
features.description: General introduction to the digital signage features
user_interactions: Click Log In button to go to login page
Click Sign Up button to go to registration page
Click Create Workspace button to start registration

features.name: Global Authentication
features.description: Log in using generic email and password credentials
user_interactions: See error messages on invalid input

features.name: Registration and Workspace Setup
features.description: Sign up a new user account and initialize a workspace with team slug
user_interactions: Fill company name and workspace slug field
Click Sign Up to create profile and team workspace

features.name: Workspace Login
features.description: Workspace-specific authentication matching the team slug context

features.name: Player Experience
features.description: Hardware rendering player for digital displays

features.name: Asset Management
features.description: Upload images/videos and configure custom dashboard widgets or flows
user_interactions: Upload image or video files using upload zone

features.name: Playlists sequencing
features.description: Arrange media items into playlists with custom durations and orders
user_interactions: Add media items to playlist timeline

features.name: Device management and Pairing
features.description: View screens status, pair new players, rename screens, assign playlists
user_interactions: Click Pair Screen and enter numeric code
